instruction: Harden authentication and authorization systems against common attack vectors. Use to audit JWT configuration, OAuth flows, session management, token storage, privilege escalation risks, and RBAC correctness. Base operacional: # Playbook  ## Objective Harden authentication and authorization systems to prevent unauthorized access and privilege escalation.  ## Rules of JWT

workflow.action: Audit JWT — algorithm (RS256 preferred), expiry, refresh rotation, and claim validation.
Review token storage — no JWT in localStorage, use httpOnly cookies or server sessions.
Verify OAuth flows — state parameter, PKCE, redirect URI validation.
Audit RBAC — map every role to permissions, verify no privilege escalation paths.
Test authorization on every protected endpoint with each role and anonymous access.
Review account recovery flows — password reset, magic link expiry, rate limiting.
